adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated unique key for this request. Prevents duplicate feedback submissions on retries. MUST be unique per (seller, request) pair to prevent cross-seller correlation. Use a fresh UUID v4 for each request.

performance_index.description: Normalized performance score (0.0 = no value, 1.0 = expected, >1.0 = above expected)

package_id.description: Specific package within the media buy (if feedback is package-specific)

creative_id.description: Specific creative asset (if feedback is creative-specific)
